faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Millburn during fall?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs seek warm shelter as temperatures drop, and Millburn's mature trees and traditional homes with attics and crawl spaces provide ideal overwintering sites. They congregate on sunny exterior walls before finding entry points through gaps, vents, and windows, making fall the peak season for infestations.

faqs.question: What does your stink bug control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection to identify entry points, exterior perimeter treatment to create a protective barrier, interior treatment of affected areas, sealing recommendations for gaps and cracks, and follow-up visits if needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to stink bug problems in Millburn?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Millburn residents in most cases. Stink bug infestations are most effectively treated before populations establish indoors, so we prioritize rapid response, especially during peak fall migration seasons when infestations are most severe.

faqs.question: Is the treatment safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products specifically selected for residential use that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We provide clear instructions for any brief precautionary measures and ensure all treatments meet the highest safety standards for Millburn homes.
